thi3:1.2:
p_19Th2_70
"Paṇṇavīsativassāni,
yato pabbajitāya me;
Nābhijānāmi cittassa,
samaṁ laddhaṁ kudācanaṁ.
thi3:1.3:
p_19Th2_71
Aladdhā cetaso santiṁ,
citte avasavattinī;
Tato saṁvegamāpādiṁ,
saritvā jinasāsanaṁ.
thi3:1.4:
p_19Th2_72
Bahūhi dukkhadhammehi,
appamādaratāya me;
Taṇhakkhayo anuppatto,
kataṁ buddhassa sāsanaṁ;
Ajja me sattamī ratti,
yato taṇhā visositā"ti.
thi3:2.2:
p_19Th2_74
"Catukkhattuṁ pañcakkhattuṁ,
vihārā upanikkhamiṁ;
Aladdhā cetaso santiṁ,
citte avasavattinī.
thi3:2.3:
p_19Th2_75
Sā bhikkhuniṁ upagacchiṁ,
yā me saddhāyikā ahu;
Sā me dhammamadesesi,
khandhāyatanadhātuyo.
thi3:2.4:
p_19Th2_76
Tassā dhammaṁ suṇitvāna,
Yathā maṁ anusāsi sā;
Sattāhaṁ ekapallaṅkena,
Nisīdiṁ
pītisukhasamappitā
;
Aṭṭhamiyā pāde pasāresiṁ,
Tamokhandhaṁ padāliyā"ti.
thi3:3.2:
p_19Th2_78
"Ye ime satta bojjhaṅgā,
maggā nibbānapattiyā;
Bhāvitā te mayā sabbe,
yathā buddhena desitā.
thi3:3.3:
p_19Th2_79
Suññatassānimittassa,
lābhinīhaṁ yadicchakaṁ;
Orasā dhītā buddhassa,
nibbānābhiratā sadā.
thi3:3.4:
p_19Th2_80
Sabbe kāmā samucchinnā,
ye dibbā ye ca mānusā;
Vikkhīṇo jātisaṁsāro,
natthi dāni punabbhavo"ti.
thi3:4.2:
p_19Th2_82
"Divāvihārā nikkhamma,
gijjhakūṭamhi pabbate;
Nāgaṁ ogāhamuttiṇṇaṁ,
nadītīramhi addasaṁ.
thi3:4.3:
p_19Th2_83
Puriso aṅkusamādāya,
‘dehi pādan’ti yācati;
Nāgo pasārayī pādaṁ,
puriso nāgamāruhi.
thi3:4.4:
p_19Th2_84
Disvā adantaṁ damitaṁ,
manussānaṁ vasaṁ gataṁ;
Tato cittaṁ samādhesiṁ,
khalu tāya vanaṁ gatā"ti.
thi3:5.2:
p_19Th2_86
"Amma jīvāti vanamhi kandasi,
Attānaṁ adhigaccha ubbiri;
Cullāsītisahassāni
,
Sabbā jīvasanāmikā;
Etamhāḷāhane daḍḍhā,
Tāsaṁ kamanusocasi".
thi3:5.3:
p_19Th2_87
"
Abbahī
vata me sallaṁ,
duddasaṁ
hadayassitaṁ
;
Yaṁ me sokaparetāya,
dhītusokaṁ byapānudi.
thi3:5.4:
p_19Th2_88
Sājja abbūḷhasallāhaṁ,
Nicchātā parinibbutā;
Buddhaṁ dhammañca saṁghañca,
Upemi saraṇaṁ munin"ti.
thi3:6.2:
p_19Th2_90
"
Kiṁme
katā rājagahe manussā,
Madhuṁ pītāva
acchare;
Ye sukkaṁ na upāsanti,
Desentiṁ buddhasāsanaṁ.
thi3:6.3:
p_19Th2_91
Tañca appaṭivānīyaṁ,
asecanakamojavaṁ;
Pivanti maññe sappaññā,
valāhakamivaddhagū.
thi3:6.4:
p_19Th2_92
Sukkā sukkehi dhammehi,
vītarāgā samāhitā;
Dhāreti antimaṁ dehaṁ,
jetvā māraṁ savāhinin"ti.
thi3:7.2:
p_19Th2_94
"Natthi nissaraṇaṁ loke,
kiṁ vivekena kāhasi;
Bhuñjāhi kāmaratiyo,
māhu pacchānutāpinī".
thi3:7.3:
p_19Th2_95
"Sattisūlūpamā kāmā,
khandhāsaṁ adhikuṭṭanā;
Yaṁ tvaṁ ‘kāmaratiṁ’ brūsi,
‘aratī’ dāni sā mama.
thi3:7.4:
p_19Th2_96
Sabbattha vihatā
nandī
,
Tamokhandho padālito;
Evaṁ jānāhi pāpima,
Nihato tvamasi antakā"ti.
thi3:8.2:
p_19Th2_98
"Yaṁ taṁ isīhi pattabbaṁ,
ṭhānaṁ durabhisambhavaṁ;
Na taṁ dvaṅgulapaññāya,
sakkā pappotumitthiyā".
thi3:8.3:
p_19Th2_99
"Itthibhāvo no kiṁ kayirā,
cittamhi susamāhite;
Ñāṇamhi vattamānamhi,
sammā dhammaṁ vipassato.
thi3:8.4:
p_19Th2_100
Sabbattha vihatā
nandī
,
Tamokhandho padālito;
Evaṁ jānāhi pāpima,
Nihato tvamasi antakā"ti.
